changeSet.author: labsolution
changeSet.comment: Ensure live SD1 result units exist as OpenELIS UOM rows with UCUM codes (LIS-92).
changeSet.sql:
WITH sd1_units(unit_name, unit_code, ucum_code) AS ( VALUES ('mg/dL', 'mg/dL', 'mg/dL'), ('U/L', 'U/L', 'U/L'), ('g/L', 'g/L', 'g/L'), ('mmol/L', 'mmol/L', 'mmol/L'), ('umol/L', 'umol/L', 'umol/L') ) UPDATE clinlims.unit_of_measure u SET code = v.unit_code, ucum_code = v.ucum_code, is_active = 'Y', lastupdated = now() FROM sd1_units v WHERE u.id = ( SELECT min(u2.id) FROM clinlims.unit_of_measure u2 WHERE lower(u2.name) = lower(v.unit_name) OR lower(u2.description) = lower(v.unit_name));
WITH sd1_units(unit_name, unit_code, ucum_code) AS ( VALUES ('mg/dL', 'mg/dL', 'mg/dL'), ('U/L', 'U/L', 'U/L'), ('g/L', 'g/L', 'g/L'), ('mmol/L', 'mmol/L', 'mmol/L'), ('umol/L', 'umol/L', 'umol/L') ) INSERT INTO clinlims.unit_of_measure (id, name, description, lastupdated, code, ucum_code, is_active) SELECT nextval('clinlims.unit_of_measure_seq'), v.unit_name, v.unit_name, now(), v.unit_code, v.ucum_code, 'Y' FROM sd1_units v WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.unit_of_measure u WHERE lower(u.name) = lower(v.unit_name) OR lower(u.description) = lower(v.unit_name) OR u.code = v.unit_code);

rollback.sql: DELETE FROM clinlims.unit_of_measure WHERE name IN ('mmol/L', 'umol/L') AND code IN ('mmol/L', 'umol/L') AND ucum_code IN ('mmol/L', 'umol/L');

changeSet.author: labsolution
changeSet.comment: Reconcile the LIS-86 seeded SD1 analyzer to the live SMT-SD1 wire identity and identifier pattern (LIS-92).

rollback.sql: UPDATE clinlims.analyzer SET name = 'Seamaty SD1', identifier_pattern = NULL, last_updated = now() WHERE name = 'SMT-SD1' AND ip_address IS NULL AND port IS NULL;

changeSet.author: labsolution
changeSet.comment: Seed/complete the live SD1 20-test serum chemistry catalog with LOINC and UOM metadata (LIS-92).

rollback.sql:
DELETE FROM clinlims.sampletype_test WHERE test_id IN ( SELECT id FROM clinlims.test WHERE local_code LIKE 'SD1-%-Serum');
DELETE FROM clinlims.test WHERE local_code LIKE 'SD1-%-Serum' AND loinc IN ( '22748-8', '1798-8', '2345-7', '14631-6', '2093-3', '2571-8', '14629-0', '2098-2', '1751-7', '6768-6', '2885-2', '2157-6', '2324-2', '2085-9', '3094-0', '3084-1', '14628-2', '1920-8', '1742-6', '2160-0');

changeSet.author: labsolution

and.sqlCheck: SELECT CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.analyzer WHERE name = 'SMT-SD1' OR identifier_pattern = '^SMT-SD1$') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

changeSet.comment: Map the live SD1 OBX-3.1 chemistry codes, including mixed-case Crea, to LOINC-bearing Tests (LIS-92).

rollback.sql: DELETE FROM clinlims.analyzer_test_map WHERE analyzer_test_name IN ( 'LDL', 'AMY', 'GLU', 'TB', 'TC', 'TG', 'DB', 'CHE', 'ALB', 'ALP', 'TP', 'CK', 'GGT', 'HDL', 'BUN', 'UA', 'TBA', 'AST', 'ALT', 'Crea') AND analyzer_id IN ( SELECT id FROM clinlims.analyzer WHERE name = 'SMT-SD1' OR identifier_pattern = '^SMT-SD1$');
